title: Ladka Ladki
actors: Kishore Kumar, Mumtaz Askari, I.S. Johar
plot: Girdharilal Patwarilal offers two feuding artistes, Asha and Kishore, to come together and form a "Free Club" to entertain people free of cost, to which they agree. Kishore finds out that he has been named as the sole survivor of ...
